validation_rows.requirement: P3-SPEC-ELEMENTS review is approved and subject-bound
P3-SPEC-CLOSURE review is approved and subject-bound for interaction message authority consumed by patterns
schema-bound pattern artifacts use current root and record required fields exactly
all pattern artifacts declare the standard envelope and correct registry or records payload contract
shared component reuse is semantic and rejects visual-only reuse
reuse_scope and downstream pattern refs resolve only to canonical element ids, approved messages, or approved exceptions
every approved interaction message has presentation coverage and no presentation decision references unknown messages
equivalent information uses one presentation mode unless an approved consistency exception allows all used modes
transient-only modes cannot carry sustained, persistent, audit, session, processing, or user-decision information as an unrecoverable surface
candidate scope stays inside P3-SPEC-PATTERNS and does not create locks, layout decisions, or implementation code

minimum_test_obligations: visual-only reuse with missing semantic fields is rejected
reuse_scope referencing projection-excluded element id is rejected
layout pattern row defining carrier, breakpoint, scroll, width, height, ordering, or z-axis behavior is rejected
approved interaction message without presentation decision is rejected
presentation decision referencing unknown message_ref is rejected
equivalent information using different modes without approved exception is rejected
exception whose allowed_modes do not cover all used modes is rejected
sustained unrecoverable user-decision information using TOAST only is rejected
downstream layout pattern_ref missing from shared_component_registry is rejected
P3-SPEC-CLOSURE review binding is checked directly before consuming interaction message ids
